title: Canonical under sustained DDoS attack as Ubuntu 26 releases Iranian group 313 Team claims responsibility
summary: Canonical, the company behind Ubuntu, is facing a sustained DDoS attack. The attack coincides with the release of Ubuntu 26. The Iranian group 313 Team has claimed responsibility for the attack.
insight: Critical infrastructure exposed to cyber threats via operating system releases

title: Biwin M350 2TB SSD Review: A Better Budget Alternative?
summary: The Biwin M350 offers a budget-friendly PCIe 4.0 SSD with good performance and power efficiency, but it still suffers from the limitations of QLC flash in sustained performance.
insight: Budget SSDs can deliver surprisingly good performance with the right specs.

title: The Pentagon announces AI deals with OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Nvidia, and more LLMs to be deployed on classified Department of War networks for lawful operational use
summary: The U.S. Department of War partnered with seven AI providers to deploy large language models (LLMs) on classified networks for operational use. This agreement allows the department to diversify its AI resources and avoid vendor lock-in. Multiple providers include OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, and Amazon.
insight: Diversifying AI resources to mitigate vendor lock-in risks and ensure flexibility

title: Skyrocketing component prices push Big Tech capex to record $725 billion Microsoft alone attributes $25 billion of AI budget to increased memory and chip costs
summary: Big Tech companies plan to spend a record $725 billion on capex in 2026, a 77% increase from last year. This surge in spending is largely driven by skyrocketing component prices. Microsoft attributes $25 billion of its AI budget to increased memory and chip costs.
insight: Rising component prices fuel Big Tech's record-breaking capex spending surge

title: Microsoft begins rolling out Xbox Mode to Windows 11 desktops and laptops consolidated storefronts and console-style interface come to PC
summary: Microsoft is rolling out Xbox Mode to Windows 11, replacing the standard desktop with an Xbox-style interface designed for gamepad navigation. This update aims to bring a console-like experience to PC gamers. The interface is optimized for gamepad control.
insight: Gaming on PC just got a console-like makeover experience

title: SoftBank plans robotics and AI firm in the US to build data centers aims for $100 billion valuation and an IPO this year
summary: SoftBank plans AI and robotics startup for data centers, targeting $100 billion valuation and IPO this year in the US.
insight: Massive data center expansion could drive AI innovation and growth.

title: Huawei could seize China s AI chip crown in 2026 as Nvidia's H200 shipments stall in regulatory limbo Beijing pushes homegrown AI hardware dominance in a market projected to hit $67 billion by 2030
summary: Huawei is poised to lead China's AI chip market as Nvidia faces export restrictions, potentially becoming the top AI chip supplier in China. Analysts predict China's domestic AI chip market will reach $67 billion by 2030. The market shift could cement China's dominance in AI technology.
insight: China's AI chip market dominance has significant global tech implications.

title: Slimline Commodore 64C Ultimate Edition computers go up for pre-order firm reintroduces the C64 s sleeker 1986-1994 styling across the range
summary: The Commodore 64C Ultimate Edition features the C64's sleeker 1986-1994 styling, recreated using original molds and tooling, going up for pre-order.
insight: Nostalgic design revival sparks interest among retro computing enthusiasts and collectors.

title: ASML's roadmap for chipmaking lithography tools examined from DUV to Low-NA, High-NA, Hyper-NA, and beyond
summary: ASML shipped 48 EUV and 131 immersion DUV tools in 2025, generating $32.7 billion in revenue. This was accompanied by a $38.8 billion order backlog. The company continues to play a crucial role in the chipmaking industry.
insight: Accelerating semiconductor advancements with cutting-edge lithography technology matters

title: Wingtech posts $1.3 billion loss and faces Shanghai delisting as Nexperia audit collapses 57% of company's assets can't be verified
summary: Wingtech faces delisting risk in Shanghai due to financial losses and audit issues. The company posted a significant $1.3 billion loss and 57% of its assets cannot be verified. This threatens the company's listing on the Shanghai bourse.
insight: Financial transparency and accountability are crucial for companies' market survival.

title: Save a huge $400 on this Acer Predator OLED gaming laptop with an RTX 5070 Ti and 32GB DDR5, now under $1,800 big saving on Helios Neo 16S AI rig that ships with a 24-core Intel CPU, 1TB SSD, and a 240Hz refresh rate
summary: Best Buy offers the Acer Predator Helios Neo 16S AI laptop at a discounted price of $1,799.99, which is $400 less than its original price. This gaming laptop features a powerful RTX 5070 Ti, 32GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 240Hz OLED display. It also comes with a 24-core Intel CPU and 1TB SSD.
insight: Gaming laptops with AI and high-end specs become more affordable.

title: Mark Zuckerberg says Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs to pay for AI infrastructure insatiable compute demand means the company can't rule out further headcount reductions
summary: Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs to fund AI infrastructure expansion. The company spent $72.2 billion on capex in 2025 and expects to nearly double that figure in 2026. This significant increase in spending is driven by the insatiable compute demand for AI.
insight: Meta's AI ambitions come at the cost of significant job cuts.

title: Intel details 18A-P process node, touts higher performance, lower power, and better thermals 9% more performance, thermal conductivity improved by 50%
summary: Intel's 18A-P process node boasts improved performance, power efficiency, and yields.
insight: Faster, cooler, and more efficient chips for emerging applications.

title: Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum receive clamshell makeover iconic 8-bit legends join the handheld gaming wars
summary: Retro Games Ltd and Blaze Entertainment are releasing handheld versions of the Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum for $129.99. The C64 Handheld and The Spectrum Handheld will bring iconic 8-bit gaming to a new format. Preorders are now available.
insight: Nostalgic gamers can now carry 8-bit classics on the go

title: Linux exploit instantly grants administrator access on most distributions since 2017 cryptography optimization snafu grants root privileges to local users
summary: A zero-day exploit, stemming from a 2017 cryptography optimization, grants administrator access on most Linux distributions, potentially compromising the security of millions of systems.
insight: 2017 cryptography optimization vulnerability leaves massive Linux user base exposed

title: Prunt Board 3 3D printer control board offers smoother and quieter operation (Crowdfunding)
summary: The Prunt Board 3 is a 3D printer control board designed for smoother and quieter operation, featuring advanced hardware and firmware capabilities.
insight: Smoothers 3D printing with 31-phase velocity profiles and hardware acceleration.

title: NFL stadium deploys manhole sensors to secure network, tighten terror threat security
summary: Sensor Works deploys rugged sensors on manhole covers to prevent tampering and enhance security.
insight: Advanced sensors strengthen physical security measures against potential threats.

title: "Copy Fail" is a rare Linux bug that can turn an unprivileged user into a root admin in seconds
summary: A rare Linux bug, 'Copy Fail' (CVE-2026-31431), allows unprivileged users to gain root access quickly.
insight: Unprecedented privilege escalation via a 732-byte Python script compromises kernel security.

title: The Mac Mini is sold out for "several months" as AI developers snap them up for local agent workloads
summary: The Mac Mini is sold out for several months due to AI developers' demand, driven by faster-than-expected customer adoption of AI and agentic tools on the Mac Mini and Mac Studio.
insight: AI developers drive demand for Macs in local agent workloads quickly.

title: Epic Games Store launches on iPhone in Japan, but not one developer has signed on
summary: Epic Games Store launches on iPhone in Japan post new law. The Mobile Software Competition Act, passed in December 2025, requires digital platforms to support alternative app distribution and payment systems. However, no developers have signed on for the Epic Games Store.
insight: New law fails to attract developers to Epic Games Store

title: Samsung's chip profit jumped nearly 50-fold in a single year, execs warn the shortage will get worse
summary: Samsung's semiconductor operating profit surged nearly 50-fold to $36.15 billion in Q1.
insight: Supply chain shortage of semiconductors is expected to worsen significantly.

title: This ultra-cheap, water-based iron battery could last 16 years without degrading
summary: Researchers at the Chinese Academy of Sciences developed an alkaline all-iron flow battery that can last 16 years without degrading, capable of more than 6,000 charge-discharge cycles without capacity decay.
insight: Long-lasting, cost-effective battery technology for renewable energy storage.

title: A Harvard study shows AI model can outperform physicians in emergency room diagnoses
summary: A Harvard study found an AI model outperformed physicians in ER diagnoses. The AI model identified a patient's lupus history, a crucial factor in treatment. This improved diagnosis led to better patient outcomes.
insight: AI models can provide crucial diagnoses missed by human physicians.

title: Nvidia could bring back the RTX 3060 12GB in July as memory crisis continues
summary: Nvidia may reintroduce the RTX 3060 12GB GPU in July, addressing memory shortages.
insight: Nvidia's move could ease ongoing memory shortages in the graphics market.

title: Roblox Reality is like DLSS 5 for Roblox, except it invents photorealistic details the game never had
summary: Roblox Reality combines real-time graphics and AI video generation for enhanced visuals.
insight: Revolutionizing Roblox visuals with photorealism and new game details.

title: Resident Evil's next reboot leans into horror, not just action
summary: Resident Evil's next reboot shifts focus to horror elements, departing from previous action-oriented approaches. The story revolves around Bryan, a medical courier, and an ominous night. This reboot promises a fresh take on the series.
insight: Horror-focused reboot may reignite interest in the Resident Evil franchise.

title: Microsoft admits Windows 11 lost its way, Nadella pledges to "win back fans"
summary: Microsoft's Nadella prioritizes performance, quality, and UX in Windows 11, aiming to win back users. This shift marks a departure from the company's initial strategy for the operating system. The focus is on rebuilding trust with consumers.
insight: Microsoft is reorienting Windows 11 to prioritize core user needs again.
